title: Ashen Simple Glass
description: Simplifies Ashen 16x's Stained Glass for a slightly more vanilla feel.
body:
![About](https://i.imgur.com/nMG1TNv.png)

___
Do you prefer the simpler look of vanilla Minecraft's stained glass? Don't like all the dark lines on your windows when you build with Ashen 16x? Then use this pack to simplify Ashen's glass!

This pack **does not** require Optifine, but looks better with it (or an equivalent)!

Place this pack _above_ Ashen in your load order.
___
 
This pack is designed and intended for use with [Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen).
___

[![Bisect Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/3c357293-8dfb-410a-a5e3-0d778833e154.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/aim-boot)
